headline: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About General Mills (GIS) Q4 Earnings
summary: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of General Mills (GIS) for the quarter ended May 2026 by going beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on General Mills, Lowers Price Target to $31
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Robert Moskow   maintains General Mills (NYSE:GIS) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $32 to $31.
